name: Invidious
description: Browse YouTube without tracking or ads
compose:
name: slashnode-invidious
services:
  web:
    image: ceramicwhite/invidious:build-fda8d1b
    container_name: invidious-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    environment:
      INVIDIOUS_CONFIG: |
        db:
          dbname: invidious
          user: umbrel
          password: moneyprintergobrrr
          host: invidious-postgres
          port: 5432
        check_tables: true
        invidious_companion:
        - private_url: "http://invidious-companion:8282/companion"
        invidious_companion_key: ${secret.APP_INV_SECRET_KEY}
        hmac_key: ${secret.APP_SEED}
        default_user_preferences:
          feed_menu: ["Trending", "Subscriptions", "Playlists"]
          default_home: Trending
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3420:3000
  postgres:
    image: postgres:13.7
    container_name: invidious-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    init: true
    environment:
      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/pgdata
      POSTGRES_DB: invidious
      POSTGRES_USER: umbrel
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
    volumes:
      - postgres_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql
  companion:
    image: quay.io/invidious/invidious-companion:master-6c76cab
    container_name: invidious-companion
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      SERVER_SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_INV_SECRET_KEY}
    volumes:
      - companion_data-companioncache:/var/tmp/youtubei.js:rw
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  postgres_data-db:
    name: slashnode-invidious_postgres_data-db
  companion_data-companioncache:
    name: slashnode-invidious_companion_data-companioncache
